name: Clop Ransomware Email Communication Detected
description: Detects email communication to or from addresses specifically associated with the Clop ransomware group.

prompts.prompt: Critical security alert: A communication attempt with a known Clop ransomware email address has been detected. The email was sent by '{sender}' and was received by or sent to '{recipient}' with the subject '{subject}'. This is a high-risk indicator of an active Clop incident, potentially involving ransom note delivery or negotiation attempts. Further investigation into the user '{sender}' and the contents of the email is immediately required. The event ID is '{event_id}' and the unique message ID is '{message_id}'.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The email address of the sender.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Exchange message tracking event ID (e.g., RECEIVE, SEND).

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The unique message identifier for the email.
